_comment: BL-477: the drift-watch baseline local-engineering.prompt (Architecture Rule 2) refers to - the last-REVIEWED commit SHA per watched upstream repo/branch ('we have looked at everything up to here'). This is the drift review BASELINE; swarmforge.lock.json stays the separate INSTALL pin. Advancing a SHA here is always a human commit, exactly like bumping an install pin - never something swarmforge/scripts/upstream_drift_check.bb does itself (it is strictly read-only). Checked with: bb swarmforge/scripts/upstream_drift_check.bb
